name: Pretzel Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the cream cheese and sugar. Set aside.
2. In a large mixing bowl, combine the pretzels and melted butter. Press the mixture into a 9x13 inch dish.
3. Bake at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 10 minutes.
4. Spread the cooled cream cheese mixture over the baked pretzel layer.
5. Spread the Cool Whip evenly over the cream cheese layer.
6. Chill until ready to serve.
7. In a separate bowl, dissolve the jello in hot pineapple juice. Add the frozen strawberries and stir until combined.
8. Allow the strawberry mixture to set in the refrigerator.
9. Pour the cooled strawberry mixture over the Cool Whip layer and refrigerate until serving.
Most unusual and delicious.
